fetch_requests.reason: Homepage failed with expired SSL certificate (net::ERR_CERT_DATE_INVALID). Re-fetching with relaxed TLS verification or via HTTP would yield all baseline vendor information: products, headquarters, supply chain role, and compliance claims.

tagline: Vendor identity and product lines unknown; homepage and public records provide no actionable detail on capabilities, certifications, or program involvement. Recommend direct outreach to clarify operational status.
